title: platanthera mandarinorum var. neglecta
intro: Platanthera mandarinorum var. neglecta is a rare and lesser-known variety of the orchid species Platanthera mandarinorum, specifically found in certain regions of the Americas. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tincture or dried for use in teas, with some practitioners also using it in salves and ointments for topical application.
